query: My Claude Code session is slow and feels like it's using too much context. Help me audit it.
expected_behavior: Names the 75% threshold of the 200k window (or expresses the budget as a percentage of the context window) as the trigger for token-efficient mode
Recommends checking the prompt-cache hit rate as one of the audit's diagnostic steps
Recommends using subagent dispatches with a summary-only return contract (or equivalent: writing large tool results to a file and referring by path) to reduce inline tool-result bloat
